entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTIVITY
entities.description: The measure of agricultural output per unit of input.

entities.name: LIVELIHOODS
entities.description: The means of securing the basic necessities of life for rural communities.

entities.name: CROP BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and variability of crops within a given area.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: Regions characterized by low and erratic rainfall and high temperatures.

entities.name: CROP PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of growing crops for food, fiber, or fuel.

entities.name: MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The process of dealing with or controlling agricultural systems.

entities.name: STRATEGIC ASSESSMENT
entities.description: A systematic evaluation of agriculture in specific regions.

entities.name: PEST
entities.description: Organisms that damage crops or livestock.

entities.name: DISEASE
entities.description: Pathogenic organisms that cause illness in crops.

entities.name: INTEGRATED CONTROL
entities.description: A holistic approach to managing pests and diseases.

entities.name: VEGETATIONAL DIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of plant species in a particular habitat.

entities.name: ARTHROPOD
entities.description: Invertebrate animals including insects and spiders.

entities.name: ORGANIC RESOURCES MANAGEMENT
entities.description: The practice of managing organic materials to improve soil and crop health.

entities.name: SOIL BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety of organisms living in the soil.

entities.name: CROP PERFORMANCE
entities.description: The measurable output and health of a crop.

entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A geographical region in Africa.

entities.name: SOIL FLORA
entities.description: Plants and other photosynthetic organisms living in the soil.

entities.name: SOIL FAUNA
entities.description: Animals living in the soil.

entities.name: POLLINATION
entities.description: The transfer of pollen to allow plant fertilization.

entities.name: SEED-SUPPLY INTERVENTIONS
entities.description: Targeted actions to improve the availability and quality of seeds.

entities.name: NEGLECTED CROPS
entities.description: Crops that are underutilized or ignored in mainstream agriculture.

entities.name: CROP-LIVESTOCK SYSTEMS
entities.description: Agricultural systems integrating both crop and animal production.

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL BIODIVERSITY
entities.description: The variety and variability of animals, plants and micro-organisms used directly or indirectly for agriculture.
